text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, I'm Super Creek. Hehe, let's take
good care of each other.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my dream? Well... What's yours, Trainer?
Because my dream's to make yours come true! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy now, you can tell me! Letting me
pamper you a whole bunch is more than enough
to make me happy, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
